criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance user experience and financial management.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, developer information.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The overall usability and design quality of the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app ratings, expert evaluations.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: The range and usefulness of features offered by the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, expert evaluations.

criteria.name: Security
criteria.description: The robustness of the app's security measures to protect user data.
criteria.sources: Developer information, security audits, user reviews.

criteria.name: Cost
criteria.description: The affordability of the app, including any subscription fees or in-app purchases.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, expert evaluations.
